programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss Katkar encourages all four to stay fit and excercise strictly, Zordaar follows instructions but Honey Bunny do not.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.desc: Hiroshi tries to give Shin-chan the slip so he can go on a golf trip with his colleagues. However, he fails and ends up playing with Shin-chan.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Due to a power cut, the lights go out in Shin-chan's home. As a result, he and his family decide to have their dinner in the candle light.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A cream filled bun is kept aside for Narita, who is a guest. However, Shin-chan ends up eating all the cream from the bun.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes a trip to the store in her car and takes Shin-chan along with her. However, a distraction causes Misae to lose control and bump into a statue.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae receives five boxes of tissues from the market and brings them home, Shin-chan mistakenly discards the old tissues along with the new ones.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae exchanges Shin-chan's books for tissue papers, Shin-chan retrieves them and makes the promise to care better for them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his family visit a hotel where Misae gets locked out of the room whilst wearing only a towel. Consequently, she tries to hide.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.desc: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Ten strangers and a dog wake up on a mysterious spaceship, unaware of why they're there. Meanwhile, the Nohara family faces an uncertain future as they grapple with their bizarre circumstances.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Shinnosuke and companions awaken after 100 years of hibernation. Soon, they realise their last shared memory is a mall parking lot, and the group collaborates to get back to Earth.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Shinnosuke and Ellen witness a small ship's sudden explosion, questioning the motive. Meanwhile, Hiroshi discovers a mysterious door.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: When Hiroshi retrieves a 100-year-old Soda Gold bottle, hungry Shinnosuke attempts to drink it. Later, they discover a pillar of sweet, jelly-like food.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Mr Smith is Jiro Jailbreaker, an 800-year fugitive controlling all the food. Meanwhile, Takosuke butters up Jailbreaker for rations, and Hiroshi pleads for his family's share.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: When Micchi and Yoshirin miss roll call, Shinnosuke and the others go looking for them. However, they discover that the number of capsules does not correspond to the number of people on board.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Shiro suddenly enlarges, causing Jailbreaker to suspect him as the alien. Meanwhile, Hiroshi suggests a method to identify humans as Shiro undergoes further transformation.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Paranoia grips everyone as Jailbreaker guards the food supply with a laser gun. Meanwhile, the situation suddenly shifts when Shinnosuke mentions seeing Chocobi snacks in a closed-off room.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: A robot disguised as a middle-aged woman captures Shinnosuke and friends. However, Jailbreaker helps them escape the confinement, and Ellen goes to find James.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Alien Buttman appears and reveals the humans on board are his food. After Buttman's attack, the group escapes to a food storage room where a robot takes Himawari hostage.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: A tonsil robot emerges from the female shell, guiding the group's escape to Earth. Meanwhile, the mother ship begins to explode, and everyone race to the cockpit.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: When Buttmen attack, chaos erupts, and Shinnosuke abandons Hiroshi to rescue Shiro. Shinnosuke's parents try to intervene, but a fire door separates him and the dog from the rest of the group.

programme.title: Shin chan Spin-off vol.1 Aliens vs. Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Shinnosuke faces off against Buttman in an intense butt battle. Meanwhile, the outcome will determine whether Shinnosuke and his companions will return safely to Earth.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

programme.desc: Anjali is upset and deeply hurt to see Taarak eating a heavy breakfast with the Gadas. Champaklal supports Taarak until Anjali tells him about what Taarak did with her home-made meals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Anjali goes out of town for a day, Jethalal plans an elaborate feast for Taarak. In order to avoid eating diet food cooked by Daya, Taarak fakes being ill. Anjali finds out and gets tensed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Since Taarak cannot go out, Jethalal asks Natu Kaka and Bagha to bring food to Gokuldham. The duo land in trouble when the huge carton they're using to hide the food is seen by Goli.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pandemonium breaks out when Sodhi informs everyone that Anjali has returned home. While all the men hide in the kitchen with the food, Taarak tries to distract Anjali from the food aroma.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Realising that the men are lying, all the women are furious and decide to teach them a lesson. Daya insists on using a special trick to get rid of the rat in Taarak's kitchen.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Later, Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply. Later, she decides to leave her house.

programme.title: CID

programme.desc: Champaklal loses his temper when he finds out his rail tickets can only be used on the same day. Meanwhile, Anjali and Taarak talk about their happy and peaceful life in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets highly influenced by London's culture and incorporates the lifestyle in Mumbai. So, when he meets the members of Gokuldham Society, he boasts of his new style.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal gets smitten by the English lady who visits Gokuldham Society in search of Jethalal. But when Daya learns about the lady, she feels insecure.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham Society meet Daya and fuel her insecurity towards Carey. Meanwhile, Champaklal gets startled by the commotion and calls Jethalal to resolve the matter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the members of Gokuldham Society discover Jethalal's alleged affair and stand in support of Daya. But when Jethalal learns about the allegations, he corrects the misapprehension.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya invites Carey home to give her a grand welcome. On the other hand, Champaklal gets annoyed by Jethalal's new hairstyle and impels him to get a new haircut.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Jethalal gets a haircut from a roadside barber while trying to avoid getting spotted by the members of Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Carey visits Gokuldham Society and gets a grand welcome from all the residents. All members later convince her to cancel her hotel booking and live with them in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Carey visits all the residents of Gokuldham Society, who help her settle in and clean her apartment. Popatlal later falls for Carey and looks for ways to spend more time with her.

programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham go to Ahmadabad with Daya in preparation for the festive season of Navratri, which is coming soon.

programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham society are still in Ahmadabad. They start to get worried that they will not be able to join the Navratri aarti ritual.

programme.desc: Other members learn that Popatlal gets lost. Daya tells Babuji about her experience in Ahmadabad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Desparate for love, Popatlal decides to ask the ladies of Gokuldham for a makeover. He seeks guidance to impress Kerry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal takes Kerry to the park for a date, but his behaviour starts to scare her. A group of goons beat him up on their way home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kerry tends to Popatlal, who gets beaten up. She happily retells her story to Daya, despite the date failing.
